svg.title: Traveloop system architecture diagram
svg.desc: Three-tier architecture showing React frontend, Express backend modules, and MySQL database with triggers and views

g.text: Zustand store · Axios (httpOnly cookie) · React Query · Recharts
Middleware: auth.js · validate.js · rateLimiter.js · adminGuard.js · errorHandler.js
Each module: routes.js → controller.js → service.js → validators.js
All SQL via mysql2 parameterized queries · Joi validation · Standard JSON response shape
users · trips · cities · trip_stops · activities · trip_activities · budget_entries · packing_items · trip_notes · refresh_tokens
CHECK constraints · UNIQUE keys · ON DELETE CASCADE · Composite indexes
FK: end_date ≥ start_date · email regex · popularity 1–10 · amount > 0 · unique share_token
